description.value: > Aristocracy Associated Domain: Nobility. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the inspiring word ability of the Nobility domain. Noble Visage (Su) You gain a +1 bonus on Charisma checks and Charisma -based skill checks against creatures that share your creature type (and subtype, if you are a humanoid ). This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 levels you possess. As a standard action, you can touch an ally to grant her your noble visage bonus against creatures that share her creature type (or subtype) for 1 minute. When you use this ability, you lose your noble visage bonus for 1 minute. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 3rdâ enter image, 9thâ overwhelming presence.
